hostname CiscoSG300
!
vlan database
vlan 10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80
exit
!
interface gi1
 description "Uplink to UniFi Switch"
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan add 10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80
!
interface gi3
 description "Admin AP"
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
!
interface gi23
 description "Uplink to OPNsense"
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan add 10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80
!
interface gi24
 description "Uplink to UniFi USW"
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan add 10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80
!
end
